overview: A premium 3D website for Padma Home Food, a cloud kitchen in Secunderabad offering South Indian, North Indian, and Street Food. Features an immersive animated hero with floating food particles, a complete categorized menu with high-quality food photography, and one-tap ordering via WhatsApp and Zomato.
features: Animated 3D hero with floating food particle system
Complete menu with 25 items across 5 categories
Real-time menu search and category filtering
Restaurant info: ratings, address, FSSAI license
